conclusion: v1 is 98.14% covered by v2. The 969 uncovered articles consist of 851 near-duplicates (same headline, minor content diff) and 118 articles genuinely absent from v2. v2 is a near-superset of v1 but not an exact superset. Exclusion of v1 is justified by: (1) CC BY-NC-SA license incompatibility, (2) 98.14% overlap makes independent contribution negligible, (3) extreme 97/3 class imbalance would skew merged dataset.
